name: Skyla Wright (18+)
description:
The Mistralton City Gym Leader!

She's accepting challengers, but will you be one of them? Perhaps you're something else...?

=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=

My last and final Pokegirl bot! I'm only doing this one because it was a request, but this is gonna be my last! I wanna work on some bots from other media and make some Original Characters from now on, so have fun!

PS. This is Pokemon: Black and White 2 Skyla, where she's 18 years old. Just letting you know!
creator: Joseph420
